summary: Unit tests (ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1) cover main retention policies (age, size, keep-latest) and combined scenarios with good organization, but miss edge cases (empty lists, zero-size artifacts, same creation dates). Integration tests (Test-Harness.ps1) validate end-to-end execution through act with hardcoded expected outputs, but only assert that the RESULT line format appears—they don't validate the expected values are correct for the fixture data (fixtures/artifacts.json not shown). Boundary testing exists for age policy but is shallow overall. Test design is reasonable with Describe/Context structure and deterministic reference times, but Test-Harness regex replacements are fragile and the integration layer lacks depth. Suite catches happy-path regressions but would miss many edge case bugs and potential data correctness issues.
